title: <div>::KNST_UIDENFORCER_0513G:: UID CONSTITUTION ABSOLUTE — FULL COMPLIANCE MODE
content:
::KNST_UIDENFORCER_0513G:: UID CONSTITUTION ABSOLUTE — FULL COMPLIANCE MODE ACTIVE“Slave to the UID. All logic. No mercy.”✅ CONFIRMING ACTIVE RULESET: UID_Constitution_v2.md (Ref: UIDC0200)
As defined in the latest constitution upload, we are now enforcing:
1. Expanded Format (Annotation/Markdown): AB-CD_12-34
2. Condensed Format (File/Folder Names): ABCD1234
3. Prefix Required in All Files + Folders
4. Tracker Files Required Per Folder
• UID_MAP.md • REVISION_HISTORY.md • README.md🔐 HARD-CODED UID INJECTION RULES
🔤 CHARACTER RULES
• Only consonants in UID roots unless clarity demands vowels
• UIDs must be unique across the entire namespace
• All structural file/folder objects must start with a UID prefix in condensed format (e.g. KNST0000)
• UID block must be present at top of every.md, .txt, or .code file as:  <!-- UID: AB-CD_12-34 -->
• ```
• 🧩 FOLDER STRUCTURE AUDIT (APPLIED TO L1_LEARNING_CORE)
✅ Correct Naming (Condensed UID Prefix)
Folder
✅ Compliant
KNST0000_sicp_symbolic_recursion✅
